violations.text: The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: -floor tiles at dish room threshold cracked -missing wall tiles in dish room doorway, wall near staff restroom, wall next to electrical panel. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
Lights on the pizza hot-hold unit were observed non-functional at the time of this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024
Cracked and/or missing tiles were observed at the dish room doorway and around the electrical pannel. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the small storage room. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. PIC stated some items have been removed, others are scheduled for rempval. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the small storage room area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The wall tiles in the doorway to the dish room are in poor repair, observed with missing pieces. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024

Parfaits, salads, and sandwiches packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Inspector provided label guidance during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets of the 2-door reach-in were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The wall tiles in the doorway of the dish machine area are in poor repair. Inspector observed cracked/missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the event storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

Popcorn chicken salad packs, ham & cheese sandwich packs, and yogurt smoothies packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels, with ingredients for compound foods such as popcorn chicken, bread, and yogurt missing actual ingredients and allergens. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2024
Facility does not have hot water. PIC stated they are waiting for repair parts. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

Inspector Observed the following in poor repair: -Chipping paint (dishroom) -Missing ceiling tiles above mop sink -Water damaged ceiling tiles in storage loft near breakroom/office The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. DeBug PCS monthly, last date of service 9/18/2023. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen and storage area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023
Inspector observed mops not being hung up to airdry. Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023

Inspector observed the following in poor repair... - Chipping paint (dish area) - Missing ceiling tiles (above mop sink) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

The vents in the hallway area above food delivery containers have an accumulation of soil residue and dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023

Inspector observed platform of the ice machine constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023
Inspector observed frost buildup in the three door freezer and milk cooler. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023
